creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Miroslav Lachman from comment #27)
Thanks for the tip Miroslav. TBH I don't really have to use opcache there. For me the investigation is over, but to make this PR proficient we need some outcome. Probably adding post install messages in pkg-message.mod for www/mod_php8{0,1,2} suggesting disabling ASLR for www/apache24 with the command "elfctl -e +noaslr /usr/local/sbin/httpd" if any issues occur for the users, could solve some issues would be helpful and the only outcome we can provide. What do you think about it Muhammad ?
